title: Caprifolium leianthum
taxonomy: Caprifolium leianthum is a species of flowering plant in the family Diervillaceae. This plant is native to China and belongs to the order Dipsacales. Within the kingdom Plantae, Caprifolium leianthum is classified as a dicotyledonous shrub. The specific classification of Caprifolium leianthum is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - angiosperms, clade - eudicots, clade - asterids, order - Dipsacales, family - Diervillaceae, genus - Caprifolium, species - C. leianthum. The classification highlights the plant's unique position within the plant kingdom.
